<!-- Title please uses a Conventional Commit prefix: feat: / fix: / refactor: /
     docs: / test: / build: / chore:. -->

## Summary

What this PR does and why.

## Related roadmap item

<!-- Link or quote the TODO.md item this addresses. New work should land on
     the roadmap (TODO.md) first, even as a one-line entry. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor (no behaviour change)
- [ ] Docs / chore / build

## How it was tested

<!-- DSP changes require unit tests. UI changes: manual-test notes + which OS
     you verified on. Mention the launcher run if you touched the standalone. -->

- [ ] `ctest` passes locally
- [ ] Built + ran on at least the host OS

## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional Commit message
- [ ] TODO.md item checked off (kept for history, not deleted)
- [ ] `.beep` format unchanged, or a migration + schema version bump is included
- [ ] No build artifacts or secrets committed
